name: Strade Bianche
description: Initiated in 2007 as a spin-off from the popular L’Eroica granfondo - a mass-participation cyclosportive held on the iconic sterrati, or white gravel roads (Strade Bianche), and restricted to vintage bicycles and clothing - the race quickly gained attention. In 2008, it was repositioned into the spring classics calendar, and with its gravel sectors and iconic finish on Siena’s UNESCO World Heritage-listed Piazza del Campo, it rapidly became a favourite among both riders and fans.
